Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Trial of Glorious Ascension]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — The Trial of Glorious Ascension is a test consisting of a staircase with Remnant formations within clouds of light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — The Trial of Glorious Ascension uses spirit-aspect and mind-aspect Remnants to test a disciple's resolve, determination, and spirit foundations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — One in three disciples who challenges the Trial of Glorious Ascension either dies or has their spirit broken, rendering them unable to practice sacred arts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 13''' — The Trial of Glorious Ascension is a test where only one in five surviving disciples can select from the Lesser Treasure Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 14''' — The Trial of Glorious Ascension can be completed before sunset.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — Whitehall believed Lindon cheated to pass the Trial of Glorious Ascension.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — The Heaven’s Glory School calls the process of climbing certain stairs the Trial of Glorious Ascension.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Students who complete the Trial of Glorious Ascension within a time limit are rewarded.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
